highlights.title: Adtek Is Said to Explore Hong Kong IPO at $4 Billion Valuation
highlights.description: Shenzhen Adtek Technology Co. is considering an initial public offering in Hong Kong, according to people familiar with the matter, adding to a wave of Chinese listings by businesses related to data centers and artificial intelligence.

highlights.title: Cerebras Raises $5.55 Billion in Year’s Biggest IPO
highlights.description: Artificial intelligence chipmaker Cerebras Systems Inc. raised $5.55 billion in its US initial public offering. The company priced its shares at $185 each, giving Cerebras a market value of about $40 billion, based on the shares offered and outstanding in its filings. Bloomberg’s Neil Campling reports.

highlights.title: Clio’s $500M milestone arrives just as Anthropic ups the ante
highlights.description: Legal tech startups, including Clio, which just hit $500 million in ARR, are seeing massive customer adoption.

highlights.title: Apple backs Google after EU orders Android be opened up to AI rivals
highlights.description: The company agrees with Google that it would put European users' privacy and safety at risk.

highlights.title: Nvidia's Jensen Huang on China trip: ‘President Trump asked me to come’
highlights.description: U.S. President Donald Trump on Wednesday landed in Beijing for the high-stakes summit with China.

highlights.title: Cerebras prices IPO above expected range, as Wall Street braces for AI tsunami
highlights.description: Cerebras raised $5.55 billion in its IPO, and with the chipmaker's offering, investors are gearing up for some even bigger AI deals later this year.

highlights.title: Google Tie-Up Lifts Fanuc to Record as Physical AI Bets Grow
highlights.description: Fanuc Corp. shares soared after the company said that it would tie up with Alphabet Inc.’s Google, broadening expectations for physical AI with robotics companies.

highlights.title: Blackstone’s AirTrunk Seeks $2 Billion Loan for Malaysia Growth
highlights.description: Blackstone Inc.-owned data center firm AirTrunk is marketing a $2.3 billion loan to fund a Malaysia project, according to people familiar with the matter, part of a slew of tech-linked financings in Southeast Asia spurred by the artificial intelligence boom.

highlights.title: Siri and Apple Home can control Matic vacuum/mop, here’s how
highlights.description:
I’ve been using a robot vacuum and mop from Matic Robots for several months now. It’s a solid product with Apple-level build quality that’s built on privacy and intelligence. While Apple Home integration wasn’t always a feature, I was pleased to see support arrive recently.
more…

highlights.title: Who decides what AI tells you? Campbell Brown, once Meta’s news chief, has thoughts
highlights.description: "The conversation is sort of happening in Silicon Valley around one thing, and a totally different conversation is happening among consumers."

ai.title: Nvidia Partner Hon Hai Profit Jumps With AI Sales Boost
ai.description: Nvidia Corp.’s major server assembly partner Hon Hai Precision Industry Co. reported a stronger-than-expected increase in quarterly profit, highlighting sustained spending on hardware essential for AI.

ai.title: Claude helps recover $395,000 in bitcoin trapped on a computer for years
ai.description: The owner had been trying for eight weeks to brute-force the password on their current Blockchain.com wallet, testing roughly 3.5 trillion combinations using the btcrecover service on a rented computing chip.

ai.title: Microsoft is retiring Copilot Mode on Edge, because everything is Copilot Mode now
ai.description: Copilot features are now available on Edge for mobile.

ai.title: Apple TV renews ‘Margo’s Got Money Troubles’ for season 2 ahead of next week’s finale
ai.description:
Following a strong first season with critics and viewers alike, Apple has confirmed that ‘Margo’s Got Money Troubles’ will return for season two. Here are the details.
more…

ai.title: Apple counters US smartphone decline as iPhone sales grow: report
ai.description:
According to Counterpoint Research, Apple outperformed the broader US smartphone market in Q1, helped by continued iPhone 17 demand amid weakening Android sales. Here are the details.
more…

ai.description: CAD: Cost Anomaly Detection or Create Astounding Debt?

ev_autonomous.title: Meta’s New Reality: Record High Profits. Record Low Morale
ev_autonomous.description: Next week, Meta is cutting about 10 percent of its staff. WIRED spoke with more than a dozen current and former employees about what it's like inside a company where "everyone is unhappy."

ev_autonomous.title: ‘Google Home Display’ appears, hopefully as a potential Nest Hub replacement
ev_autonomous.description:
Ahead of the upcoming release of Google Home Speaker, a new “Google Home Display” has appeared in Google app code, suggesting a new Nest Hub-esque device is in the works.
more…
